nasb.text: but Israel, pursuing a law of righteousness, did not arrive at that law.

esv.text: but that Israel who pursued a law that would lead to righteousness  did not succeed in reaching that law.

cnv.text: 但以色列人追求律法的義，卻達不到律法的要求。

ccb.text: 以色列人靠遵行律法追求义，却徒劳无功。

csbs.text: 而以色列人追求律法的义，却没有达到律法的义。
